properties.label: Base Channel
properties.description: Selects which channel on the DMX model to control. The channel list is populated from the model's node names.

properties.label: 16 bit
properties.description: When enabled, outputs a 16-bit value across two channels (coarse and fine) for higher precision servo positioning. When disabled, uses a single 8-bit channel.

properties.label: Use Timing Track
properties.description: When enabled, the servo position is driven by phoneme data from a timing track instead of the start/end value sliders, useful for lip-sync animations.

properties.label: Servo_TimingTrack
properties.description: Selects which timing track to use for phoneme-driven servo positioning when Use Timing Track is enabled.

properties.label: Start
properties.description: Toggle to lock the start position value when splitting or chaining servo effects, ensuring smooth transitions between consecutive effects.

properties.label: Start
properties.description: Servo position at the start of the effect, as a percentage of the channel's range (0-100%). The servo linearly interpolates from this value to the end value.

properties.label: End
properties.description: Toggle to lock the end position value when splitting or chaining servo effects, ensuring smooth transitions between consecutive effects.

properties.label: End
properties.description: Servo position at the end of the effect, as a percentage of the channel's range (0-100%). The servo linearly interpolates from the start value to this value.
